text.title: E2E Testing Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example: checkout flow journey with POM + factory + route-mocked payment API.

example.note: Page Object using role-based selectors (r3) and exposing methods, not raw locators (r2).
Complete user journey with route-mocked external API (r5), no fixed sleeps (r6), factory-generated data (r7).
Bad — fixed sleep (r6 violation), CSS class selector (r3 violation), full-page screenshot (r-component-screenshot violation).
